{% if docs_top_tabs is defined and docs_top_tabs %} {% set current_lang = "zh" if pagename.startswith("zh/") else "en" %} {# pagename for v1 pages starts with "v1/", for v2 with "v2/"; default to v1. #} {% set current_version = "v2" if pagename.startswith("v2/") else "v1" %}
{% for tab in docs_top_tabs %} {% set supported_languages = tab.get("languages", ["en", "zh"]) %} {% if current_lang in supported_languages %} {% set label = tab.get("label_zh") if current_lang == "zh" and tab.get("label_zh") else tab.get("label_en") %} {# href chosen by current version + language; falls back to v1 if a v2 entry is absent. #} {% if current_version == "v2" %} {% set href = tab.get("href_v2_zh") if current_lang == "zh" and tab.get("href_v2_zh") else tab.get("href_v2_en") %} {% if not href %} {% set href = tab.get("href_zh") if current_lang == "zh" and tab.get("href_zh") else tab.get("href_en") %} {% endif %} {% else %} {% set href = tab.get("href_zh") if current_lang == "zh" and tab.get("href_zh") else tab.get("href_en") %} {% endif %} {% if href %} {{ label }} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
